prevalence.source: European primary care respiratory infection syntheses

burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; risk of rheumatic fever if untreated

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Centor/McIsaac criteria with rapid antigen test or culture to confirm

publicHealthSystem.estimatedPatients: Millions of episodes annually across EU

regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Penicillin/amoxicillin; avoid unnecessary antibiotics for viral pharyngitis
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Guideline-based care and strong primary care access
